title: gonocarpus humilis
intro: Gonocarpus humilis, also known as the dwarf cord-leaf, is a type of flowering plant in the family Haloragaceae. It has been found to have medicinal properties due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Gonocarpus humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as a diuretic. In herbal preparations, Gonocarpus humilis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
